text.title: Production Embedding Patterns
text.summary: Async batch processing, retry with exponential backoff, and full pipeline with cache integration for production embedding workloads.

example.code:
import asyncio from openai import AsyncOpenAI
async_client = AsyncOpenAI()
async def get_embeddings_async( texts: list[str], model: str = "text-embedding-3-large", batch_size: int = 100, max_concurrent: int = 5, ) -> list[list[float]]: semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(max_concurrent)
async def process_batch(batch: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]: async with semaphore: r = await async_client.embeddings.create(input=batch, model=model) return [e.embedding for e in sorted(r.data, key=lambda x: x.index)]
batches = [texts[i : i + batch_size] for i in range(0, len(texts), batch_size)] results = await asyncio.gather(*[process_batch(b) for b in batches]) return [emb for batch in results for emb in batch]

section.title: Pipeline Template
section.reference: EmbeddingConfig + EmbeddingPipeline: chunk → cache check → batch embed

section.title: Model Dimension vs Quality Trade-off
section.p: For text-embedding-3-large with native dimension reduction (MTEB scores approximate):

list.item: 1024 dims: MTEB ~63.8% — good for most RAG
